notes: Phase 2 / Tier 15 (Throne of Thunder) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Holy Priest gear guide. Tier set: Exorcist line. Trinket 1 (Inscribed Bag of Hydra-Spawn) drops from multiple ToT bosses per Icy Veins, no single boss listed. Enchants/gems reused from the mop-p3 (Siege of Orgrimmar) list.
